nodes.itemHTML: • Sitecore Developer Portalstars10 - Sitecore developer portal is built with Next.js, Typescript, Tailwind CSS, and is hosted on Vercel. It uses static site generation (SSG) to create all the pages at build time. It also utilizes Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR) to automatically update the app when changes to page content are made. Many pages are written in Markdown and converted to HTML at build time. Images that are used are managed in Sitecore DAM and are published to a CDN.

• Census - The easiest way to sync your customer data from your cloud data warehouse to SaaS applications like Salesforce, Marketo, HubSpot, Zendesk, etc. Census is the operational analytics platform that syncs your data warehouse with all your favorite apps. Get your customer success, sales & marketing teams on the same page by keeping customer data in sync. No engineering favors required—just SQL. SaaS
